fields.title: Social Media Metrics That Matter
fields.metaTitle: Social Media Metrics That Matter | Learn | InstantViral
fields.metaDescription: Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cit
faqs: How often should I report metrics?
fields.imageAltText: Social Media Metrics That Matter — InstantViral Learn featured image
fields.newsletterCopy: Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cite sources when quoting benchmarks.
